items.title: Putin enemy dies suddenly from “accidental” mushroom poisoning
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Schools close as more than half of France under red heat alerts
items.dek: The health minister warns many citizens "will suffer", with temperatures set to peak on Monday.
items.body: The health minister warns many citizens "will suffer", with temperatures set to peak on Monday.

items.title: Former Kenyan justice minister blocked from entering Uganda, lawyers' body says
items.dek: Martha Karua is a lawyer representing detained Ugandan opposition leader Kizza Besigye who is on trial for treason.
items.body: Martha Karua is a lawyer representing detained Ugandan opposition leader Kizza Besigye who is on trial for treason.
